creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


problem report now is over 1 year old. 
There is a new latex2e version in the ports 
collection and the known to work teTeX port. 

We received no further feedback. I think 
you should try the new ports and submit a new 
Problem report if the problem still exists. 

BTW: upgrading the system to the new FreeBSD- 
stable (2.2-STABLE) would be a good idea as well.
